CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, event_date, toStartOfISOYear(event_date) AS iso_year_start FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toStartOfISOYear(event_date) AS iso_year_start FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT DISTINCT toStartOfISOYear(event_date) FROM test_dates ORDER BY toStartOfISOYear(event_date);
WITH (SELECT toStartOfISOYear(event_date) FROM test_dates) AS iso_dates SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iso_dates GROUP BY iso_dates;
CREATE TABLE test_dates_2 (id UInt32, event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates_2 SELECT id, event_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT d.id, d.event_date, d.iso_year_start FROM (SELECT id, event_date, toStartOfISOYear(event_date) AS iso_year_start FROM test_dates) AS d JOIN test_dates_2 AS t ON d.id = t.id;
SELECT id, event_date, toStartOfISOYear(event_date) AS iso_year_start FROM test_dates WHERE iso_year_start < toDateTime('2025-01-01 00:00:00');
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, event_date, toStartOfISOYear(event_date) AS iso_year_start FROM test_dates WHERE event_date >= toDateTime('2022-01-01');
